description: Use this API to replicate the working case in the form of power flow raw data file compatible with PSSE 15 or later. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = writerawversion(vernum, out, ofile)

parameters.name: vernum
parameters.description: Value of ofile version number vernum =’15’ or later. example: if ofile format is to be psse 29.5.1: vernum=’29’ or =’29.5’ or =’29.5.1’. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Name of the power flow raw data file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
